dao_info.sql_content:
UPDATE pms_sku_stock
        SET lock_stock = lock_stock - #{quantity},
            stock = stock - #{quantity}
        WHERE
            id = #{productSkuId}
          AND stock - #{quantity} >= 0
          AND lock_stock - #{quantity} >= 0

SELECT
            ch.*,
            c.id c_id,
            c.name c_name,
            c.amount c_amount,
            c.min_point c_min_point,
            c.platform c_platform,
            c.start_time c_start_time,
            c.end_time c_end_time,
            c.note c_note,
            c.use_type c_use_type,
            c.type c_type,
            cpr.id cpr_id,cpr.product_id cpr_product_id,
            cpcr.id cpcr_id,cpcr.product_category_id cpcr_product_category_id
        FROM
            sms_coupon_history ch
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon c ON ch.coupon_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon_product_relation cpr ON cpr.coupon_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon_product_category_relation cpcr ON cpcr.coupon_id = c.id
        WHERE ch.member_id = #{memberId}
        AND ch.use_status = 0

dao_info.sql_content:
SELECT
            o.id,
            o.order_sn,
            o.coupon_id,
            o.integration,
            o.member_id,
            ot.id ot_id,
            ot.product_name ot_product_name,
            ot.product_sku_id ot_product_sku_id,
            ot.product_sku_code ot_product_sku_code,
            ot.product_quantity ot_product_quantity
        FROM
            oms_order o
            LEFT JOIN oms_order_item ot ON o.id = ot.order_id
        WHERE
            o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT
            o.id,
            o.order_sn,
            o.coupon_id,
            o.integration,
            o.member_id,
            ot.id ot_id,
            ot.product_name ot_product_name,
            ot.product_sku_id ot_product_sku_id,
            ot.product_sku_code ot_product_sku_code,
            ot.product_quantity ot_product_quantity
        FROM
            oms_order o
            LEFT JOIN oms_order_item ot ON o.id = ot.order_id
        WHERE
            o.id = #{orderId}

UPDATE pms_sku_stock
        SET lock_stock = lock_stock - #{quantity},
            stock = stock - #{quantity}
        WHERE
            id = #{productSkuId}
          AND stock - #{quantity} >= 0
          AND lock_stock - #{quantity} >= 0

dao_info.sql_content:
SELECT
            ch.*,
            c.id c_id,
            c.name c_name,
            c.amount c_amount,
            c.min_point c_min_point,
            c.platform c_platform,
            c.start_time c_start_time,
            c.end_time c_end_time,
            c.note c_note,
            c.use_type c_use_type,
            c.type c_type,
            cpr.id cpr_id,cpr.product_id cpr_product_id,
            cpcr.id cpcr_id,cpcr.product_category_id cpcr_product_category_id
        FROM
            sms_coupon_history ch
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon c ON ch.coupon_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon_product_relation cpr ON cpr.coupon_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon_product_category_relation cpcr ON cpcr.coupon_id = c.id
        WHERE ch.member_id = #{memberId}
        AND ch.use_status = 0

SELECT
            ch.*,
            c.id c_id,
            c.name c_name,
            c.amount c_amount,
            c.min_point c_min_point,

            c.end_time c_end_time,
            c.note c_note,
            c.use_type c_use_type,
            c.type c_type,
            cpr.id cpr_id,cpr.product_id cpr_product_id,
            cpcr.id cpcr_id,cpcr.product_category_id cpcr_product_category_id
        FROM
            sms_coupon_history ch
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon c ON ch.coupon_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon_product_relation cpr ON cpr.coupon_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN sms_coupon_product_category_relation cpcr ON cpcr.coupon_id = c.id
        WHERE ch.member_id = #{memberId}
        AND ch.use_status = 0

SELECT
            m.id id,
            m.parent_id parentId,
            m.create_time createTime,
            m.title title,
            m.level level,
            m.sort sort,
            m.name name,
            m.icon icon,
            m.hidden hidden
        FROM
             ums_role_menu_relation rmr
                LEFT JOIN ums_menu m ON rmr.menu_id = m.id
        WHERE
            rmr.role_id = #{roleId}
          AND m.id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY
            m.id
